messages.author: maya
messages.text: The new search ranking flag has been at 100 percent for two weeks, so keeping the conditional path is just hiding bugs.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Remove the flag and delete the old ranking code after Friday. The rollback gets harder, but we stop carrying two query paths.

messages.author: priya
messages.text: Any objection if we keep the metrics dashboard for one more release?
